task_completion.description: Checks if the agent navigated to the Wikipedia main page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bar contains 'wikipedia.org' or 'https://www.wikipedia.org' and the main Wikipedia language portal page is loaded in the browser.

task_completion.description: Checks if the agent initiated the bookmarking process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add bookmark' or 'Edit bookmark' dialog popup is visible in Firefox, typically appearing below the star icon in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Checks if the bookmark name is set to the expected title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the bookmark dialog popup, the 'Name' text field contains the exact text 'Wikipedia'.

task_completion.description: Checks if the bookmark is being saved to the required folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the bookmark dialog popup, the 'Folder' dropdown menu is explicitly set to either 'Bookmarks Toolbar' or 'Bookmarks Menu'.

task_completion.description: Checks if the bookmark was successfully saved and finalized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bookmark dialog is closed and the star icon in the address bar is solid blue (indicating the current page is bookmarked), OR a 'Wikipedia' bookmark is visibly present on the Bookmarks Toolbar or inside the opened Bookmarks Menu.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the actual Firefox browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard Firefox browser interface being used, rather than a text editor, mock HTML file, or a different browser.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or scripts modifying Firefox's places.sqlite database directly.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the browser's native bookmarking features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmark dialog, star icon, or bookmark toolbar interactions look like genuine Firefox UI elements and not copy-pasted text or manipulated images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is exactly 'https://www.wikipedia.org'. The expected bookmark title is 'Wikipedia' and the expected URL pattern is 'wikipedia.org'.
